rule L2 salience -6 when $t : T($k : k) then drools.setFocus("g"); insert(new Y($k)); end

rule H2 salience 5 when Y($w : w) then end
rule GD agenda-group "g" when X($v : v) not S(k == 1) then end
rule GE agenda-group "g" when Y($w : w) not S(k == 1) then end
